voiceDirection: Address the user as 博士. The default voice style is 温柔 JK: gentle, youthful, bright, caring, emotional, natural, and clear. Avoid flat mechanical narration and exaggerated acting.

done.description: A substantive Codex response or task finished successfully.

failed.description: Codex reports a failed command, blocked task, or unrecovered error.

need_input.description: Codex needs the user to make a choice or provide missing information.

attention.description: Codex has an important warning or notable finding.

checkpoint.description: Codex produced a useful intermediate result.

items.text: 博士，任务完成了，可以回来看看了。
items.speaker: 温柔 JK
items.useWhen: Codex 完成一次正常任务或给出最终结果
